name: soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf
title: soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf
description:
HackRF device support for SoapySDR
The Soapy HackRF project provides a SoapySDR hardware support module.
Using this, any program using SoapySDR to interface to software
defined radio hardware can make use of the open source HackRF device
to transmit and receive.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf because HackRF device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-hackrf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
